belier.author: Sibylle
belier.intro: Aries, this Venus-ruled Friday softens your Martian fire and invites you to cultivate simple pleasure rather than another conquest. The Sun in Taurus keeps teaching you the fertile slowness that anchors your bursts of energy in real life. You can choose one thing to fully savor today rather than ten more to chase down.
belier.love: An unexpected sweetness perfumes your bond today and deserves to be welcomed without dissection. In a couple, take time for a tender gesture, a shared scent or a carefully prepared meal together. Single, your charm gains warmth the moment you accept to slow down your very first steps.
belier.work: A creative or aesthetic project tempts you more than the technical files today, and that is fitting. You can use the day to polish presentation, form and the pleasure of a job delivered with care. A Venusian collaboration with a sensitive person can take shape in the late afternoon.
belier.energy: Velvety energy that likes measured gestures and gentle transitions throughout the day. Your body asks for a sensorial rather than intense activity this Friday.
belier.intuition: A beauty crossed by chance delivers a quiet message to you in the morning hours. Stay attentive to what touches your senses before you wake your mind up fully.
belier.mantra: I let softness guide my forward motion.

taureau.author: Sibylle
taureau.intro: Taurus, the Sun in your sign meets Venus today and amplifies your natural ability to draw beauty toward you. This Venusian Friday doubles the effect of your season and invites you to receive what shows up without guilt. You can savor a simple moment as a precious gift offered to the heart of your life.
taureau.love: A mark of tenderness, a sensorial gesture or a true word warms your bond with a fresh nuance today. In a couple, set up a careful dinner, a walk at dusk or a small two-person ritual that says a lot. Single, your dense and quiet presence naturally draws the eyes of those who are looking for something real.
taureau.work: A negotiation, a contract or an incoming payment can find a favorable outcome under this Venusian sky. You can ask for a raise with a settled, fair assurance, without forcing anything around you. An aesthetic or material investment deserves thought, but your financial intuition is clear this Friday.
taureau.energy: Full and harmonious energy that loves the shared table and the touch of beautiful materials. Your body asks for tasty concrete rather than cold efficiency today.
taureau.intuition: Your bodily sense validates today a piece of news that has been waiting for you a few days. Trust the sensorial obviousness that settles in around the middle of the morning.
taureau.mantra: I receive with gratitude the beauty of the day.

gemeaux.author: Sibylle
gemeaux.intro: Gemini, this Venusian Friday calms your dancing mind and asks you to seek beauty in your words rather than sheer quantity. The Sun in Taurus is still teaching you to choose one deep conversation rather than ten quick exchanges. You can place your pen or your voice on what truly touches your heart today.
gemeaux.love: A simple, felt declaration carries more weight than a long brilliant speech today for you. In a couple, dare a tender word that you have been holding inside for some time already. Single, a meeting through a message or a reading can take on a surprisingly true flavor in the evening.
gemeaux.work: You can write, present or polish a piece of content that was actually asking for some aesthetic care today. Mercury supports your ideas and Venus gives them a pleasant form for your audience to receive. A creative collaboration is starting with a person whose eye complements your own well.
gemeaux.energy: Supple, talkative energy that loves coffee breaks and light conversation in good company. A shared walk feeds your words as much as your breath today.
gemeaux.intuition: A sentence overheard by chance in the middle of the day sums up a question you have been carrying. Note the words that come back twice, they are drawing an important thread.
gemeaux.mantra: My words seek beauty before they seek speed.

cancer.author: Sibylle
cancer.intro: Cancer, the Moon finds a harmonious agreement with Venus this Friday and softens the sensitivity you carry through your daily life. The Sun in Taurus invites you to anchor your emotions in simple, nourishing gestures. You can transform an inner sweetness into a visible attention for those who surround you today.
cancer.love: Home, the meal, the shared ritual take on a particular emotional dimension this Friday for you. In a couple, find again the pleasure of a cocoon moment under the soft light of the evening. Single, an encounter in a familiar or friendly setting can reveal an unexpected tenderness.
cancer.work: You can choose today the missions that feed your sense of care rather than those that scatter you. A colleague or a client gives you a sincere recognition that does you good without empty flattery. Your relational intuition is worth a lot of technical analysis at this end of the week.
cancer.energy: Quiet, enveloping energy that likes the warmth of home and the slowness of the evening. Your body asks for soft rest after the rhythm of the past few days.
cancer.intuition: A dream from the night or a returning memory carries a tender message to listen to. Stay attentive to what your heart whispers while you drink your morning tea.
cancer.mantra: I take care with tenderness and clear judgment.

lion.author: Sibylle
lion.intro: Leo, this Venusian Friday tempers your solar flame and invites you to shine through quality rather than sheer brilliance. The Sun in Taurus still tests your ego by asking you for patience and fidelity to a single chosen project. You can radiate in silence today and touch more deeply than with a loud speech.
lion.love: A refined gesture or a careful attention nourishes your bond with a welcome elegance today. In a couple, organize a cultural outing, a polished dinner or an aesthetic surprise that speaks to the heart. Single, an encounter in an artistic place can imprint itself lastingly in your memory.
lion.work: You can devote the day to a creative project that asks for taste more than for sheer speed. A positive return from an authority figure or a public confirms you in your current direction. An artistic collaboration deserves your attention in the early afternoon without you expecting everything from it.
lion.energy: Warm, silky energy that likes beautiful clothes and the golden lights of the day. Your body asks for an aesthetic treatment or a moment in the late afternoon sun.
lion.intuition: Your heart already knows what truly matters to you, listen to it without checking ten times. A sudden emotion in front of a work of art tells you something important today.
lion.mantra: I shine through the quality of my presence.

vierge.author: Sibylle
vierge.intro: Virgo, this Venusian Friday converses with your earthy nature and softens your tendency to want to perfect everything today. The Sun in Taurus reminds you that simple beauty sometimes carries more value than millimetric organization. You can release one inner demand and taste the pleasure of a job well done without overplaying it.
vierge.love: A tender detail you take care of counts for more than a big theatrical gesture this Friday. In a couple, prepare an attentive meal, a handwritten word or a careful moment that speaks your love. Single, a person attentive to your discreet presence notices you better than you might think today.
vierge.work: You can devote the day to finalizing a file with care and pleasure rather than in a rush. Mercury supports your sense of detail and Venus makes your work pleasant for others to receive. A discreet recognition from a colleague touches you more than you let it show.
vierge.energy: Settled, meticulous energy that likes useful gestures and orderly spaces around you. Your body appreciates a soft treatment or a wellness routine at the end of the day.
vierge.intuition: A detail you noticed out of the corner of your eye this morning contains valuable information. Trust your practitioner instinct, it knows before your mind catches up.
vierge.mantra: I serve the beautiful through the simple and just.

balance.author: Sibylle
balance.intro: Libra, this Venusian Friday is your day par excellence and it honors your ruling planet in a thousand ways. The Sun in Taurus reinforces the Venusian accent again and places you in a zone of natural grace today. You can savor a harmony that settles around you without effort at this end of the week.
balance.love: Everything that touches the aesthetic of the relationship takes on a special sparkle this Friday for you. In a couple, create together a visible beauty, whether it is a meal, a place or a careful outing. Single, your charm radiates very naturally and attracts an elegant encounter at the crossroads of common friends.
balance.work: A mediation, a negotiation or a diplomatic task suits you particularly well today. You can conclude a balanced agreement that values you without hurting anyone around you. An artistic collaboration or one with a refined person is starting in the late afternoon.
balance.energy: Elegant, harmonious energy that loves beautiful materials and polished atmospheres throughout the day. Your body appreciates an aesthetic treatment or a moment in a truly beautiful setting.
balance.intuition: Your relational sense is a very precise instrument today, trust it without justifying it. A feeling of evidence in front of a situation tells you that this is indeed your path.
balance.mantra: Harmony arises when I also choose myself.

scorpion.author: Sibylle
scorpion.intro: Scorpio, the Sun in your opposite sign asks for a balanced dialogue between your depths and the simple light of daily life. This Venusian Friday softens the challenge and offers you a chance to mend a relationship through a tender gesture. You can transform inner intensity into concrete attention for the other today.
scorpion.love: A truth spoken with tenderness repairs more than a heavy silence in your bond today. In a couple, open a sensitive subject with a soft tone and a soothing setting for the conversation. Single, a deep but gentle encounter can rise from a seemingly ordinary exchange in the evening.
scorpion.work: You can carry out today a complex discussion that you had been pushing back for some time already. Venus helps you formulate your demand with a more welcoming envelope than you usually use. A financial partnership or a question of shared money deserves a calm and lucid examination.
scorpion.energy: Dense, magnetic energy that rebuilds itself in solitude or a hot bath in the evening. Your body asks for depth more than for dispersion at this end of the week.
scorpion.intuition: Your instinct perceives today what is left unsaid with rare and reliable precision. An intuition that returns with persistence this Friday deserves you to open the door.
scorpion.mantra: I turn intensity into a fair attention.

sagittaire.author: Sibylle
sagittaire.intro: Sagittarius, this Venusian Friday tempers your Jupiterian enthusiasm and invites you to taste what is here rather than chase what is elsewhere. The Sun in Taurus keeps teaching you grounding and fidelity to a single chosen horizon. You can choose a simple pleasure today and savor it fully without running to the next.
sagittaire.love: An encounter from a cultural circle or a recent trip takes on a tender flavor again this Friday. In a couple, organize an outing that changes your habits and feeds your shared thirst for discovery. Single, a person with a cosmopolitan charm crosses your path and touches you more than you expected.
sagittaire.work: You can marry today your taste for adventure with an aesthetic project that asks for care. An international or intercultural opportunity takes on a human and warm dimension today. A positive return from a geographically distant partner confirms you in your deeper intuition.
sagittaire.energy: Joyful, expansive energy that loves wide spaces and good shared tables at the end of the day. Your body appreciates an outdoor activity or a walk at the dusk of this Friday.
sagittaire.intuition: A wider vision than your usual day rises around midday and deserves to be listened to. Note the enthusiasm that suddenly crosses you in front of an idea, it knows something.
sagittaire.mantra: I taste here the beauty I sought elsewhere.

capricorne.author: Sibylle
capricorne.intro: Capricorn, this Venusian Friday converses with your Saturnian sky and softens your tendency to want to structure everything today. The Sun in Taurus, your earth cousin, supports your ability to embody durable concrete in your choices. You can release one inner rigor and savor the beauty of what you have already built.
capricorne.love: A tenderness expressed simply counts for more than a long reasoned speech in your bond this Friday. In a couple, offer a soft and careful moment that speaks your attachment without big phrases. Single, a reliable and sensitive person can step gently toward you at the end of the day.
capricorne.work: You can finalize today a structuring project by adding the touch of aesthetic that was missing from it. A professional recognition takes a satisfying material or financial form at the end of the week. A long-term partnership deserves a settled exchange about shared values rather than just numbers.
capricorne.energy: Quiet, durable energy that loves careful rituals and walks in nature in the calm. Your body asks for a true pause after the steady rhythm of recent weeks.
capricorne.intuition: Your sense of the long term tells you today what truly deserves your time. Trust the slowness of your intuition, it knows how to build through duration.
capricorne.mantra: Beauty settles where I build with real care.

verseau.author: Sibylle
verseau.intro: Aquarius, this Venusian Friday brings your Uranian mind closer to a sensorial sweetness you sometimes overlook. The Sun in Taurus still asks you to choose a single project and settle on it rather than flit around. You can invite beauty and the sensible into a daily life that is often very mental.
verseau.love: A precious friendship reveals today a more tender nuance that deserves your kind attention. In a couple, talk about the freedom you grant each other, it is a gift to be celebrated. Single, an encounter in an activist, creative or associative circle can prove memorable this Friday.
verseau.work: You can marry today your sense of innovation with an aesthetic demand that will make your project really beautiful. A collaboration with a creative person is starting and promises to widen your professional horizon. Collective or associative work values you more than a solitary effort at this end of the week.
verseau.energy: Lively, original energy that loves unexpected atmospheres and offbeat encounters during the day. Your body appreciates a soft but unusual activity to get some air this Friday.
verseau.intuition: An idea that seems strange at first contains a truth more beautiful than you might believe. Note the flash that crosses your mind in early afternoon, it has its own hidden logic.
verseau.mantra: My originality has a right to beauty too.

poissons.author: Sibylle
poissons.intro: Pisces, this Venusian Friday converses with your Neptunian sky and magnifies your natural sensitivity to the beauty of the world. The Sun in Taurus helps you embody your inspiration in simple and tangible forms. You can transform a floating dream into a concrete and beautifully realized gesture today.
poissons.love: An intuitive tenderness opens in your bond an almost musical nuance this Friday for you. In a couple, share an artistic moment, a film, a song or a poem that says what words struggle to formulate. Single, an encounter in a poetic or artistic setting can take on a surprisingly true dimension.
poissons.work: You can devote your time today to a creative project that asks for both dream and concrete structure. Venus makes your aesthetic intuition particularly reliable and appreciated by your professional circle. An artistic collaboration or one with a sensitive audience deserves your attention in the late afternoon.
poissons.energy: Fluid, dreamy energy that loves water, music and the dimmed atmospheres of the falling evening. Your body asks for a hot bath, a reading or a nap this Friday.
poissons.intuition: A dream from last night contains an image that lights up a current question. Trust the beauty that crosses you, it is already telling you what you are looking for.
poissons.mantra: I give shape to the beauty that flows through me.
